profile.name: Sanju
profile.title: Transitioning into Senior Product Management
profile.about: Product-minded operator with a background in growth, experimentation, and stakeholder leadership. Focused on translating customer insight into measurable business outcomes.
profile.recruiterSnapshot: Strong product and growth foundation. Add two quantified leadership stories to make your transition narrative more compelling.

goals.title: Practice STAR interview response with AI Coach

suggestions.title: Quantify achievements in your current role.
suggestions.desc: Specific percentages increase credibility with ATS filters by 22%.

suggestions.title: Rewrite summary for a leadership focus.
suggestions.desc: Shift the summary from task-based language to strategic outcomes.

resume.resumeText: Product Manager with 4+ years of experience leading cross-functional teams, driving roadmap strategy, and optimizing user engagement metrics.

chatHistory.content: How do I prep for coding interviews?
For technical and behavioral interviews, structure all your answers using the **STAR method** (Situation, Task, Action, Result). State your specific actions clearly and quantify the business results!

Great question! For your focus as a Transitioning into Senior Product Management, focus on demonstrating measurable impact, structured problem solving, and clear communication. What specific topic would you like to explore next?
